tasks.label: Build+Install Lyo (Simulator)
args:
set -euo pipefail
SIM_UDID=AC0C3BCA-A0DB-4C35-A14D-D5A8E9FA3E35
xcrun simctl bootstatus "$SIM_UDID" -b
rm -rf /tmp/lyo_sim_dd
xcodebuild -project "${workspaceFolder}/Lyo.xcodeproj" -scheme Lyo -configuration Debug -destination "id=$SIM_UDID" -derivedDataPath /tmp/lyo_sim_dd build
APP=$(find /tmp/lyo_sim_dd/Build/Products -maxdepth 2 -type d -name 'Lyo.app' | head -1)
echo "APP=$APP"
xcrun simctl install "$SIM_UDID" "$APP"
xcrun simctl launch "$SIM_UDID" com.lyo.app

tasks.label: Inspect /tmp/lyo_sim_dd
args: ls -la /tmp/lyo_sim_dd || true; find /tmp/lyo_sim_dd -maxdepth 4 -type d -name '*.app' | head -20; find /tmp/lyo_sim_dd -maxdepth 3 -type f -name '*.xcactivitylog' | head -10

tasks.label: Build+Install Lyo (Simulator, Workspace DD)
args:
set -euo pipefail
cd ${workspaceFolder}
SIM_UDID=AC0C3BCA-A0DB-4C35-A14D-D5A8E9FA3E35
xcrun simctl bootstatus "$SIM_UDID" -b
rm -rf build/lyo_sim_dd
xcodebuild -project Lyo.xcodeproj -scheme Lyo -configuration Debug -destination "id=$SIM_UDID" -derivedDataPath build/lyo_sim_dd build | tee build/sim_build.log
APP=$(find build/lyo_sim_dd/Build/Products -maxdepth 3 -type d -name 'Lyo.app' | head -1)
echo "APP=$APP"
if [ -z "$APP" ]; then echo 'No .app produced'; exit 2; fi
xcrun simctl install "$SIM_UDID" "$APP"
xcrun simctl launch "$SIM_UDID" com.lyo.app

tasks.label: Xcodebuild iOS Simulator (log)
args:
set -euo pipefail
cd ${workspaceFolder}
mkdir -p build
xcodebuild -project Lyo.xcodeproj -scheme Lyo -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' build | tee build/last_build.log

tasks.label: Xcodebuild iOS Simulator (no log)
Parse Xcode build log
args:
set -euo pipefail
cd ${workspaceFolder}
for f in build/sim_dd/Logs/Build/*.xcactivitylog; do
  echo "--- $f ---"
  python3 build/parse_xcactivitylog.py "$f" || true
  echo
 done

tasks.label: Decode xcactivitylog
args:
set -euo pipefail
cd ${workspaceFolder}
for f in build/sim_dd/Logs/Build/*.xcactivitylog; do
  echo "--- $f ---"
  xcrun xcactivitylog "$f" | tail -200
  echo
 done

tasks.label: Check pbxproj A2UI paths
args:
set -euo pipefail
cd ${workspaceFolder}
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('Lyo.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj').read_text()
for needle in ['Sources/Core/A2UI', 'Sources/Core/Sources/Core/A2UI']:
    count = text.count(needle)
    print(needle, count)
PY

tasks.label: Check pbxproj A2UI paths (bytes)
args:
set -euo pipefail
cd ${workspaceFolder}
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('Lyo.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj').read_bytes()
for needle in [b'Sources/Core/A2UI', b'Sources/Core/Sources/Core/A2UI']:
    count = text.count(needle)
    print(needle.decode(), count)
PY

tasks.label: Xcodebuild iOS Simulator (capture stderr)
Xcodebuild iOS Simulator (log file)
args:
set -euo pipefail
cd ${workspaceFolder}
mkdir -p build
(xcodebuild -project Lyo.xcodeproj -scheme Lyo -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' build) > build/last_build.log 2>&1 || true

tasks.label: Xcodebuild iOS Simulator (log file 2)
args:
set -euo pipefail
cd ${workspaceFolder}
mkdir -p build
(xcodebuild -project Lyo.xcodeproj -scheme Lyo -destination "platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17" build) > build/last_build.log 2>&1 || true

tasks.label: Xcodebuild iOS Simulator (log file clean)
args:
set -euo pipefail
cd ${workspaceFolder}
mkdir -p build
xcodebuild -project Lyo.xcodeproj -scheme Lyo -destination "platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17" build > build/last_build.log 2>&1 || true

tasks.label: Check pbxproj conflict markers
args:
set -euo pipefail
cd ${workspaceFolder}
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('Lyo.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj').read_text(errors='ignore')
markers = ['<<<<<<<', '=======', '>>>>>>>']
found = False
for m in markers:
    if m in text:
        print('Found', m)
        found = True
if not found:
    print('No conflict markers found')
PY

tasks.label: Find pbxproj file ref outside section
Check xcodebuild version
Xcodebuild iOS Simulator (log text)
args:
set -euo pipefail
cd ${workspaceFolder}
mkdir -p build
xcodebuild -project Lyo.xcodeproj -scheme Lyo -destination "platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17" build > build/last_build.txt 2>&1 || true

tasks.label: Xcodebuild iOS Simulator (log file DD)
Agent Isolated Lyo Build
args:
set -euo pipefail
cd ${workspaceFolder}
pkill -f xcodebuild 2>/dev/null || true
xcodebuild -project Lyo.xcodeproj -scheme Lyo -destination "id=3243647D-F0AA-4D63-8F57-E22B543D5545" -derivedDataPath /tmp/lyo_agent_task_dd -skipPackageUpdates -disableAutomaticPackageResolution build
